TransactionSecurityPolicy.blockMessage:
The operation you requested isn't allowed due to Carmignac security policies.
Contact your Salesforce administrator (Technology_sales_marketing@carmignac.com) and CISO (okeles.meet@carmignac.com) for more information about security policies.
TransactionSecurityPolicy.customEmailContent:
One of Carmignac transaction security policies was triggered on Salesforce


Policy Name: {{policy.MasterLabel}}

Event responsible for triggering this policy:

{{policy.EventName}} on {{event.QueriedEntities}} object associated with user {{event.Username}} at {{event.EventDate}}.


Triggered query : {{event.Query}}

Number of records: {{event.RowsProcessed}}


Please note that this query has been blocked


For more context about this event, refer to these event fields:

Org ID: {{policy.OrganizationId}}

User ID:{{event.UserId}}


Regards,
TransactionSecurityPolicy.description: This TSP blocks API call on Account, Opportunity and Case objects on more than 500 records Manage excluded profiles on TSP Setting through Custom Metadata Types
